priority_data_fixes.issue: Weak annual Eurostat unemployment and migration depth in this sample.
priority_data_fixes.recommended_official_source: ONS API time series (labor + migration releases) with transparent concept mapping.

priority_data_fixes.issue: Eurostat and official BDL migration series diverge in overlap window.
priority_data_fixes.recommended_official_source: Keep BDL patch with documented definition bridge; avoid naive one-to-one replacement beyond overlap checks.

priority_data_fixes.issue: Long-rate control missing/short in Eurostat stream.
priority_data_fixes.recommended_official_source: OECD/central-bank long-term rates as explicit control fallback.
